steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The notes give one direct figure: “In 2021, there were a total of 392 merchant ships registered in Saudi Arabia.” This is the only statement that provides the exact number of ships.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D restates that figure exactly, adding a clarifying phrase about what merchant ships are.
The other three choices discuss deadweight tonnage or define the term, none of which give the ship count.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
